testcase.name: setup

error.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created from chrome not reachable Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-MP8N8LH', ip: '10.44.123.139' Build info: version: '4.40.0', revision: 'b3333f1' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [], extensions: []}}]}]
